# PHIL.114 ? Customer Lifetime Value Focus

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** customer_focus
**Subcategory:** customer_lifetime_value_focus
**Domain:** CUSTOMER_FOCUS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Optimize for long-term customer value, not single transactions

## Application
Invest in retention, measure LTV, balance acquisition and retention, build sustainable relationships
